personal.name: Raushan Kumar Yadav
personal.title: Presales Engineer | Network Engineer | ELV & Security Systems Specialist
personal.about: Results-driven Network and ELV Engineer with over 6 years of experience in designing, implementing, and managing enterprise network and security systems. Specialized in ANPR, CCTV, access control, and multi-site infrastructure projects for government and enterprise clients. Proven ability to lead projects, optimize network performance, and deliver secure, scalable solutions.

services.title: Enterprise Network Solutions
services.description: Design and implementation of LAN/WAN, routing, switching, VPN, firewall, and multi-site network infrastructure.

services.title: CCTV & Security Systems
services.description: End-to-end deployment and optimization of surveillance systems including IP cameras, NVRs, and monitoring platforms.

services.title: Access Control & ELV Systems
services.description: Design and deployment of enterprise access control systems, biometrics, and integrated ELV solutions.

services.title: Presales & Solution Design
services.description: BOQ preparation, solution architecture, technical proposals, and client consultation for IT and security systems.

projects.name: Shell Oman Enterprise Access Control System
projects.description: Led design and deployment of enterprise access control system using HikCentral platform. Managed system architecture, device integration, VLAN configuration, structured cabling, testing, and full project handover.
projects.impact: Delivered secure and scalable access control system with full compliance to HSE and enterprise standards.

projects.name: Hotel IT Infrastructure Deployment
projects.description: Designed and implemented full hotel IT infrastructure including Aruba Wi-Fi, SonicWall firewall, PABX system, and structured cabling.
projects.impact: Improved network performance, security, and user experience for hotel operations and guests.

projects.name: MOI Qatar Smart Traffic System (POC)
projects.description: Developed and implemented smart traffic solution including ANPR, seat-belt detection, and violation monitoring systems.
projects.impact: Enhanced traffic monitoring and automated violation detection.

projects.name: Lusail City ANPR & Radar Integration
projects.description: Led ANPR system integration with radar and backend systems. Handled design, troubleshooting, and coordination with multiple stakeholders.
projects.impact: Improved enforcement accuracy and system reliability.

highlights: Leading enterprise network and ELV project deployments
Designing LAN/WAN, VPN, VLAN, firewall, and Wi-Fi infrastructure
Managing CCTV, access control, and ANPR system integration
Handling project planning, documentation, and client delivery
Designed and maintained enterprise network infrastructure
Configured routers, switches, ANPR systems, and surveillance networks
Troubleshot L2/L3 issues and optimized performance
Worked on government-level smart traffic projects
Provided L2 support for enterprise networks
Configured VLAN, NAT, DHCP, and firewall rules

education.degree: Bachelor in Electronics and Communication Engineering
